description: You search the bed and find something hidden in the straw.
You find a small wooden supply box beside the wall.
On an abandoned guard table you see an old weapon.
The cellar is almost black. A lantern hangs from a hook.
In the kitchen you find dried meat hanging from a hook.
A priest spirit speaks and offers you holy protection.
Hidden inside a locked archive box you find the Royal Seal.
Inside the armory you see a steel shield beside broken armor.
Near a broken wall opening you spot a rope hanging beside loose stones.
